recipe.title: Pantry Tasting Menu
ingredients: mac and cheese if we're lucky
trail mix pretending to be a side dish
steps: Open the pantry and let it reveal your destiny.
If mac and cheese appears, act like this was the plan all along.
If only popcorn appears, pivot boldly into movie-theater dinner territory.
Season with enough confidence that nobody feels invited to object.
Plate in bowls. Bowls make everything feel more deliberate.
Announce tonight's experience as a limited-run tasting menu.
Eat before anyone nominates you to order takeout.
